hooks.command: if git diff --quiet && git diff --staged --quiet && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then echo '[auto-commit] Working tree clean, skipping.'; exit 0; fi; DATE=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d"); BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only; git diff --staged --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | head -10); SUMMARY=$(echo "$CHANGED" | sort -u | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/  */ /g' | cut -c1-120); MSG="auto: ${DATE} — ${SUMMARY:-changes}"; git add -A 2>&1 || { echo '[auto-commit ERROR] git add failed' >&2; exit 1; }; git commit -m "$MSG" 2>&1 || { echo '[auto-commit ERROR] git commit failed' >&2; exit 1; }; git push origin "$BRANCH" 2>&1 || { echo '[auto-commit ERROR] git push failed' >&2; exit 1; }; echo "[auto-commit] Pushed: $MSG"
